candidates.comparison: compiled async TP (fuse_gemm_comms=True) vs non-compiled regular TP
candidates.c1_weak_oracle: agree — compare_two_settings does exact dict equality on generated output
candidates.c2_realistic_breakage: agree — async TP fuses gemm+comms, changing accumulation order; verified no VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT in test or conftest
candidates.c3_no_strong_contract: agree — Not Strong #5: async TP fused distributed compile-pass vs unfused baseline; Not Strong #1: compiled vs non-compiled
candidates.code_snippet:
compare_two_settings(
    model_id,
    async_tp_args,
    tp_args,
    method="generate",
    force_v1_runner=True,
)

candidates.comparison: compiled async TP+SP (fuse_gemm_comms=True, enable_sp=True) vs non-compiled regular TP
candidates.c1_weak_oracle: agree — compare_two_settings does exact dict equality on generated output
candidates.c2_realistic_breakage: agree — SP+async TP fuses comms changing accumulation order; NVFP4 adds numeric sensitivity
candidates.c3_no_strong_contract: agree — Not Strong #5: async TP + SP fused compile-pass vs unfused baseline
candidates.code_snippet:
compare_two_settings(
    NVFP4_MODEL_ID,
    async_tp_args,
    tp_args,
    method="generate",
    force_v1_runner=True,
)

candidates.comparison: compiled with sequence parallel (enable_sp=True) vs non-compiled regular TP
candidates.c1_weak_oracle: agree — compare_two_settings does exact dict equality on generated output

    model_id,
    tp_sp_args,
    tp_args,
    method="generate",
    force_v1_runner=True,
